## Summary

## User or maintainer problem

## Implementation

## Verification

- [ ] Targeted tests
- [ ] Full required test suite
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Changelog updated for user-visible behavior

## Safety and security

- [ ] Paper-first behavior preserved
- [ ] No credential, private-data, or telemetry changes
- [ ] No live-execution gate change
- [ ] Untrusted inputs remain validated

## Public compatibility

- [ ] No public API/schema change
- [ ] Compatible change documented
- [ ] Breaking change includes migration plan

## Dependencies and provenance

- [ ] No new dependency
- [ ] New dependency purpose/license recorded
- [ ] Contribution is original or appropriately licensed
